feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Fiori
feed.subtitle: SAP Fiori Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: /IWBEP/IF_MGW_SOST_SRV_RUNTIME is active but still have services with not supported status
entry.content:
tried activating the services PP_SCHEDULEPRODUCTION_SRV

but getting status as not supported.

checked the interface /IWBEP/IF_MGW_SOST_SRV_RUNTIME and its active as per snote - 1986626 

please support

entry.title: Is there a way to check the fiori app that is enabled
entry.content:
Hello, all

In the current system, I would like to check whether Fiori ID (app) is enabled or disabled.
(The list of Fiori IDs I want to check is in Note.)
https://me.sap.com/notes/3003624/E

 

For example, I would like to confirm that Fiori ID (F1311) Appname (My Leave Requests (Version 2) is enabled.
Is there a way to check?

entry.title: May I know the usage status of the relevant Fiori app
entry.content:
Hello, All

I'm working on Fiori for the first time.
 
I need to find out the usage status of Fiori app, please help me.
 
1. For example, if I said I was checking Fiori ID (F1311), where should I check it?
2. T-code: If Service is active in SICF, is it correct to use the app?
3. To use that APP, is there a way to see which Role is granted?
4. Is there any other way

entry.title: When uploading attachments through Fiori, the backend system prompts for virus scanner profile.
entry.content:
Hi,

Facing issues when uploading attachments through Fiori, the backend system prompts for virus scanner profile.

Please suggest.

entry.title: How to Upload a File in a RAP Freestyle V2 Application?
entry.content:
I'm working on reading data from an Excel file, but due to customer restrictions, I'm unable to use third-party libraries. My approach is to upload the Excel file to the backend, process the content there, and then send the data back to the frontend.

I am using UploadSet for the file upload, and while the upload process claims to be successful, the corresponding table in the backend is not being populated. I also tried using unmanaged save with RAP, but the code doesn't seem to be triggered when I attempt to upload the file.

Doe anyone know how to handle this scenario or what I am doing wrong?

Sample Codes:

UploadSet:

 

<upload:UploadSet
  id="idAttach"
  instantUpload="false"
  uploadEnabled="true"                         
  uploadUrl="/sap/opu/odata/sap/SERVICE/InvoiceAttachSet"
  mode="None">
</upload:UploadSet>

 

Upload JS:

 

onUploadBtn: function(){
  var oAttachmentUpl = that.getView().byId("idAttach"); 
  var aIncompleteItems = oAttachmentUpl.getIncompleteItems();
  var iIncompleteItems = aIncompleteItems.length;

  for(var i = 0; i < iIncompleteItems; i++){
    var sFileName =  aIncompleteItems[i].getProperty("fileName");
    var oXCSRFToken = new sap.ui.core.Item({
      key: "X-CSRF-Token",
      text: that.getOwnerComponent().getModel("SERVICE").getSecurityToken()
    });
    var oSlug = new sap.ui.core.Item({
      key: "SLUG",
      text: sEingangnr + "/" + sFileName
    });
                
  oAttachmentUpl.addHeaderField(oXCSRFToken).addHeaderField(oSlug);
  oAttachmentUpl.uploadItem(aIncompleteItems[i]);
  oAttachmentUpl.removeAllHeaderFields();
  } 
}

 

RAP Behavior Definition:

 

managed implementation in class xxx unique;
strict ( 2) );

define behavior for xxx alias Excelupload
with unmanaged save
lock master

authorization master ( instance )
{
 create;
 update;
 field (readonly) Equnr;
}

entry.title: RAP CDS annotation based custom action triggering automatic navigation to object page S/4HANA 2023
entry.content:
Hi Experts,
When I Click on CDS annotation based custom action  "clean" defined in table header triggering automatic navigation to object page. Action implemented using  bopf .

@ui.lineItem:[{ type: #FOR_ACTION, position: 1, dataAction: 'BOPF:CLEAN', label: 'Clean'}]

I have checked CDS annotation, there is no semanicaction and semanicobject annotation defined on this action  and checked bopf class and manifest as well did not find any root cause of this automatic navigation issue.
This is custom app
SAP S/4HANA 2023

entry.title: Embedding S4 Custom Fiori app inside BTP Fiori app
entry.content:
Hello SAP Team,
I would like to embed/load S/4HANA Custom Fiori App inside BTP hosted freestyle Fiori App in a container or iframe. I was investigating if this is doable, flow is that user wants to load the S/4HANA deployed Fiori app from the Custom SAPUI5 app deployed in BTP based on some criteria with some parameter on click of a button on next screen which will be detail screen wrapping up the embedded Fiori app from S/4HANA by passing the required URL parameter, is there any way this can be achieved through standard services on BTP or is it doable?

Any point of view or suggestions are most welcome.

Thanks, Siddharth

SAP Business Technology Platform SAPUI5 SAP Build Work Zone, advanced edition

entry.title: Using Fiori 8D problem solving for defect created in S/4 Hana using SAP QM
entry.content:
Hello
I've just completed a migration from ECC to S/4 Hana. My QM manager need to manage a 8D report on Defects created in S/4 Hana with QM01 tarnsaction or similar. I know which Porblem solving 8D metodology is available only in FIORI using APP F2929. I can manage 8D procedure only for defects created directly in FIORI using Create defect Tile, but I'm not able to Process defects previously created on S/4 QM environment (QM01 or similar). Someone can suggest to me a solution ? Is it possible manage  8D Metodolgy in Fiori for defects created in S/4 QM too ?
Thank-you in advance for your help
Claudio

entry.title: Error During Preview Application for Fiori Tools Generate Project
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I ran into an issue when working on this tutorial: 

https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/fiori-tools-generate-project.html

There are no errors in Visual Studio Code, but when I try to view the site in a browser it's blank. I see the following error in the console:

Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 404 (Not Found)
send @ jquery-dbg.js:9325Understand this error
jquery-dbg.js:9325 


Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 404 (Not Found)
send @ jquery-dbg.js:9325Understand this error
jquery-dbg.js:9325 


Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 404 (Not Found)
send @ jquery-dbg.js:9325Understand this error
assert-dbg.js:34 Assertion failed: could not find any translatable text for key 'appTitle' in bundle 'i18n/i18n.properties'
a @ assert-dbg.js:34Understand this error
Container.js?eval:2 Uncaught (in promise) TypeError: e.indexOf is not a function
at q.createRenderer (Container.js?eval:2:1588)
at locate-reuse-libs.js:231:38
at Core-dbg.js:1357:5
at Array.forEach (<anonymous>)
at Core._executeInitListeners (Core-dbg.js:1356:14)
at Core._executeInitialization (Core-dbg.js:1369:3)
at Core.init (Core-dbg.js:1191:4)
at Core-dbg.js:485:9
at a (Core-dbg.js:179:5)
at SyncPoint.finishTask (Core-dbg.js:173:5)

Has anyone come across this before?

entry.title: Is it possible to integrate a sapui5 BarcodeScanner in CAPM application..?
entry.content:
Hi team 😃,

I was working fine with SAPUI5 framework based FIORI apps. Recently I have enrolled in a CAPM training. I got an doubt that Is it possible to integrate a sapui5 BarcodeScanner in CAPM application. I searched for proper technical answer but found nothing. I understood that when it is about data manipulation we can do awesome job with CDS based JavaScript ecosystem, but when it is about implementing custom applications like scanner, camera is it feasible through CAPM. I am sorry if i have posted without proper understanding, I am still learning.

SAPUI5

entry.title: Sort and filter not working extended standard fiori app
entry.content:
Hi Experts , 

We extended a standard fiori app and new fields been added in the odata service ,but sort and filter features  not working for newly added fields. Let me know if anyone faced similar issue

@Fiori 

Thanks in Advance

entry.title: How to create a Fiori tile for a new RAP fiori app in SAP S/4 HANA cloud public edition
entry.content:
Hello experts, 

I am working on the last version 08 2024 of SAP S/4 HANA Cloud Public Edition.

I would like to know how to create a new Fiori tile for a Fiori application created automatically with ADT with the " Generate ABAP Repository objects " feature.

Here is what I did:

  • First I created a custom table in ADT: 

  • Used the option " Generate ABAP Repository objects " to generate a RAP application and a Fiori screen allowing me to maintain records in my custom table easily

Several objects got thus generated and I could create/edit and delete records in my custom table easily from a web browser

Now all is good.

The only point I want to add is a new Fiori tile that would allow users to click on it, in order to access this custom table and to maintain the records directly. Also, this new Fiori tile should be "searchable" when user writes its name in the main search bar: 

How to achieve this please? Does anyone know?

Thank you all

entry.title: Enable SAP IAG on SAP mobile start application
entry.content:
Hi All,

Can we enable SAP IAG in the SAP Mobile Start application?

Could someone please assist with the process or provide any relevant documentation?

Thanks

Prameel

entry.title: Looking for app developers who monitor apps they deployed
entry.content:
Hi,

We're working on a new dashboard for application monitoring for frontend, backend, and fullstack developers. 

I'm looking for developers who monitor the application they deployed for short interview to better understand what info you would expect to see and what actions you would expect to be available for you.

No need to prepare anything. Only meet for 30 min interview and impact on dashboard design.

Your feedback is highly appreciated.

Ravid (ravid.ellenbogen@sap.com)

entry.title: Looking for app developers who monitor apps they deployed
entry.content:
Hi,

We're working on a new dashboard for application monitoring for frontend, backend, and fullstack developers. 

I'm looking for developers who monitor the application they deployed for short interview to better understand what info you would expect to see and what actions you would expect to be available for you.

No need to prepare anything. Only meet for 30 min interview and impact on dashboard design.

Your feedback is highly appreciated.

Ravid (ravid.ellenbogen@sap.com)

entry.title: Identify table and field for rejection comment in lean service entry sheet process
entry.content:
Hi Team

For lean service entry sheet approval process users receive notification in the app inbox with two option

accept or reject

Upon rejection pop up appears for user to provide comments and the status to provide comments and the status of the lean service entry sheet updated to rejected with the comment entered at the time of rejection.

Please help identify table and field where the rejection comment stored so we can fetch information for reporting


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: ETag handling in UI5
entry.content:
Hi everyone, 

I am working with an SAP OData V4 API that uses ETags as an optimistic locking approach. 

I have bound the data to a table but when I change the data and want to update it through the API, no ETag is set in the HTTP request resulting in a 412 error and failing requests. 

I have not found any setting options for this on the model and also no way to set the ETag manually. The only option I have found so far is to completely ignore the ETag (setting a fixed If-Match: * header) and therefore undermining the locking approach.

I can't imagine that ETag handling isn't possible here. Has anyone had any experience with this and can explain to me what needs to be done?

entry.title: Lazy Loading tabs in an Object page
entry.content:
I've implemented stash-based lazyloading of my different tabs using ObjectPageLazyLoader,

and it's working fine the first time the user enters the Object page of my List Report app. However, if the user navigates back to the list page and picks another item to go to the Object page, all the tabs that were previously navigated to (and loaded lazily) now get loaded all together right at the start.

How do I make the lazy-loading reinitiate when the Object page is hit again with a different item?

Thanks

 

<uxap:ObjectPageSection "idItinExpSec"... >
   <uxap:ObjectPageSubSection id="idItinExpSubsec" ... >
	<uxap:ObjectPageLazyLoader id="idItinExpLazy" stashed="true">
.
.
.

entry.title: Documentation on strategyForVisibilityChange and lazyLoading
entry.content:
Can someone please provide some information on the Strategy For Visibility? I've seen the following code snippet in some UI5 apps but I can't find any documentation on what it does and how it works:

<uxap:customData>
   <core:CustomData key="strategyForVisibilityChange" value="lazyLoading"/>
</uxap:customData>

Would appreciate any help.

entry.title: How to Emphasize or add Color Coding to Custom Buttons in Fiori Elements created via Controller Ext.
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We have created a Fiori Elements Application with the List & Object Page. In the Object Page, we have created two Buttons in header using Controller extension with Page map as shown below.

By default those buttons are not Emphasized or can't add any color for button as shown below.

 

How can we achieve this to Emphasize the button or add some Color as UI Guidelines?

Thanks for feedback

SAP Fiori MakersSAP Fiori Elements
